title: SetupEventHandler Object
description: The SetupEventHandler is a client implemented class that can be added as a handler to a SetupEvent.

methods.name: notify
methods.description: The function called by CAM when the associated event is fired.

parameters.name: eventArgs
parameters.description: Returns an object that provides access to additional information associated with the event.
